name: Heroes of the Realm: The New MMORPG
description:
You have bought the newest RPG, Heroes of the Realm! It’s super popular, and the first to allow people to digitally enter the game. Unfortunately, it’s a little buggy…

NOTE: If TG or TF of some sort doesn’t occur to you on its own, you will have to gently nudge the bot towards whatever transformation you’re wishing for. As annoying as this might be, I prefer to keep this specific bot this way so that it allows freedom for the player to have whatever they want happen to them.

So, here’s a bit of a random curveball from what I usually do (which, most of the bots I make are all over the place), but here’s one I wasn’t entirely certain about making public.

I’m a huge fan of TGTF, and I’ve experienced a few great bots here made for those purposes, but I decided to make this one since I didn’t really see many TGTF bots based around getting stuck in a game.

This bot was made for me first and foremost and it’s mostly random that I’m suddenly deciding to make it public, so let me know if there’s anything I can improve. My test run I was insanely happy with, but if there’s anything I could do better, I’d appreciate it.

Say it with me; if the bot speaks for you or responses randomly cut off, THIS IS NOT A PROBLEM I CAN SOLVE. Sometimes it’s just gonna do that, so either edit those things out or generate a new response. But other issues I can solve.

Since I love TGTF so much, I might make a few more bots of this nature, but I’ve also got a few other bot ideas I want to do; some based on some games I adore and probably another LizieDoodle bot if the inspiration strikes the right spot.

I hope you enjoy, fellow weirdos and freaks!
creator: DahliaTheGeek
